blockers.detail: A direct non-CLI run_chain() probe returned immediately with status=done and completed_count=4, so the reconciled original epic cannot satisfy the active-session requirement by resuming in place.

The same direct probe rewrote metadata.execution_environment.target_head from accepted target head dfe60989d794e6c4f91a35955216759fd2804ed6 to workspace HEAD d362f9a2aacd61e32224adfb41bdf441f75ce2d0, so repeated direct relaunches would degrade custody provenance unless repaired first.

replacement_supervisor.scope: Observe original marker/spec/custody from the clean fixed engine without launching a nested megaplan harness.
replacement_supervisor.handoff: Keep the original epic in clean complete custody while the supervised replacement logs status from the clean-lane engine.
